case_title: DEAN POULAKIDAS VS. MICHAEL WATERFIELD et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS RECEIVED VIA MAIL, FILED AND FORWARDED TO ACCOUNTING FOR PROCESS.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.00 - SERVED JUL-16-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT POULAKIDAS, DEAN

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WATERFIELD, MICHAEL WATERFIELD, SARA GLASS RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT POULAKIDAS, DEAN $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $120.00, JUDGMENT FOR CROSS-DEFENDANT DEAN POULAKIDAS. ENTIRE SEC. DEPOSIT OF $2,700 WAS APPLIED AGAINST THE DEFAULT IN RENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
